editor_note: The clever part is not calling itself an open-source Firebase alternative. The clever part is turning Postgres into the center of an entire developer stack: auth, storage, realtime, and edge functions. Where most backend platforms hide the database behind abstractions, Supabase leans into it. That makes the product more opinionated and easier to reason about than a generic backend cloud.
investors: Felicis Ventures, Coatue Management, Y Combinator
